Hooks

Hooks allow you to intercept and customize Claude Code's behavior.

Events

The following hook events are supported:

Event NameDescriptionBlocking
PreToolUseFires before any tool is executedYes
PostToolUseFires after any tool completesNo
StopFires when Claude stops generatingNo
NotificationFires when Claude sends a notificationNo
SubagentStopFires when a subagent stopsNo
PreCompactFires before context compactionYes

Configuration

Hooks are configured in your CLAUDE.md or settings files.

SettingTypeDescription
hooksobjectMap of event names to hook configurations
